tests.description: A guard trip must propagate across a function-call boundary. The outer guard(time: 20ms) wraps a call to inner(), whose sleep(150ms) overruns the budget. The abort unwinds through inner's generated function-body catch (which must re-throw the AgencyAbort, not convert it) and lands at the outer guard's try, which converts it to a timeoutFailure. Exercises the collapsed single instanceof AgencyAbort rung in the function-level catch ladder (B2).
